permissionLog: Logs permission check events per carer, recording the action, page, and whether it was found. Standalone security audit table.
permissionRoleCarer: Assigns named role codes to specific carers for admin or app permission purposes. Related to carer.
permissionRoles: Defines named permission roles with a code and linked permission ID per company/location. Referenced by permissionRoleCarer.
permissionsCarer: Assigns individual permission items to specific carers with value flags. Related to carer and permissionList.
permissionsLocation: Controls which permission categories are enabled at a specific location or area. Related to permissionCategories.
permissionsModules: Controls which permission module categories are enabled at a specific location or area. Related to permissionCategories.
permissionsRolesName: Defines named permission role groups with code references per company/location. Related to company and location.
permissionsTemplate: Defines named permission templates for assigning sets of permissions to carers. Referenced by permissionsTemplateCarer and permissionsTemplates.
permissionsTemplateCarer: Assigns a permission template to a specific carer. Related to carer and permissionsTemplate.
permissionsTemplates: Links individual permission items to a permission template with value flags. Related to permissionsTemplate and permissionList.
personal_access_tokens: Laravel Sanctum table storing API personal access tokens for tokenable entities. Standalone authentication table.
pic: Stores image blobs for clients with type and description. Related to client.
pics: Stores general user-uploaded images with type and detail metadata. Standalone image store.
planCareParsings: Tracks AI care plan document parsing jobs, storing uploaded file references, job IDs, output text, and processing status. Related to client.
planCareTasks: Stores care plan tasks extracted from parsed documents, linking task types, medications, posology, and goals. Related to planCareTaskTypes.
planCareTaskTypes: Lookup table of care plan task type names and categories. Referenced by planCareTasks.
planCareVisitPeriods: Lookup table of named visit period options used in care plan parsing. Standalone.
planTaskGoals: Lookup table of goal names extracted from care plan parsing. Referenced by planCareTasks.
planTaskPosology: Lookup table of medicine names extracted from care plan parsing. Referenced by planCareTasks.
postJob: Records unassigned or open visit job posts that can be offered to carers. Related to client and carer.
postJobOffers: Tracks carer responses to posted job offers, including link follow, acceptance, and decline. Related to postJob and carer.
powerOfAttorney: Legacy table storing power of attorney details linked to a contact record. Related to contacts.
ppeBranchSplit: Defines the percentage split of PPE stock allocation per branch. Related to company.
ppeBranchStock: Tracks current PPE stock levels at branch level with last delivery date. Related to company and location.
ppeCarerLog: Logs PPE usage events per carer per visit, recording old and new stock quantities. Related to carer and client.
ppeCarerStock: Tracks current PPE stock quantities allocated to individual carers with alert thresholds. Related to carer.
ppeClientBalance: Records PPE balance transactions for clients, tracking amount changes and linked branch balance. Related to client and carer.
ppeClientBranchBalance: Records PPE stock transfers and usage between branch and client level. Related to client.
ppeDeliveryHistory: Logs PPE delivery events to branches with quantity and date. Related to ppeBranchStock.
ppeDistributionHistory: Logs PPE distribution events from branches to individual carers. Related to carer.
ppeInventoryEdit: Logs manual inventory adjustments to branch PPE stock with old/new quantities and reason. Related to company and location.
ppeProduct: Defines PPE product records with reusable flags, stock limit thresholds, and unique product IDs. Referenced by all PPE stock tables.
ppeTransferLog: Logs PPE stock transfers between branches with quantity, date, and reason. Related to ppeProduct.
preferredCarers: Records preferred carer assignments for clients with position ranking and recent event tracking. Related to client and carer.
prefixNumber: Defines invoice or document prefix configurations per area with company contact details. Related to company and area.
pricing: Legacy pricing rate rules by day/time band and job type. Related to company and location.
printScreen: Logs print screen actions by users for audit purposes. Related to location.
pushKey: Stores push notification keys (device tokens) for carers. Related to carer.
pushNotificationLog: Logs push notification delivery attempts to carers with success/failure status and message content. Related to carer.
qrClocking: Records QR code clock-in/out events for carers visiting clients. Related to carer, client, and timesheets.
qrGenerate: Stores generated QR codes for clients used in location-based clocking. Related to client.
qualificationtypes: Legacy lookup table of qualification type names per company/location. Superseded by cmQualificationsType.
questionnaireAnswers: Records carer answers to onboarding or HR questionnaire questions. Related to carer and questionnaireQuestions.
questionnaireOptions: Defines answer options for questionnaire questions with position ordering. Related to questionnaireQuestions.
questionnaireQuestions: Defines global questionnaire questions with position ordering. Referenced by questionnaireOptions and questionnaireAnswers.
questionnaireQuestionsCompany: Assigns questionnaire questions to specific companies/locations. Related to questionnaireQuestions.
rcAreaHistory: Tracks changes to a client or carer's assigned area over time with effective date ranges. Related to carer and client.
rcBed: Defines individual beds within rooms in a residential care home, with type, rate, occupancy, and block status. Related to rcRoom and area.
rcCareHome: Defines residential care home records with address, contact, manager, and geolocation. Related to area.
rcClientSchedule: Records client bed/room/ward assignment schedules with date range and job type. Related to client and rcBed.
rcLog: Audit log of page actions and SQL operations within the residential care module. Related to client and carer.
rcRequestedHours: Records carer shift hour requests within residential care, with approval workflow. Related to carer and area.
rcRoles: Defines named staff roles within a residential care wing or area with job type association. Related to area.
rcRoom: Defines rooms within a residential care home with bed capacity, rate, and ordering. Related to area and rcWing.
rcShift: Defines named shift templates for residential care with times, job type, and day range. Related to area.
rcShiftSchedule: Records individual carer shift schedule assignments within residential care, including role, group, and timesheet flags. Related to carer, rcShift, and area.
rcShiftScheduleDeleted: Archives deleted residential care shift schedule records for audit purposes. Related to carer and rcShift.
rcUpskillReason: Lookup table of reasons for upskilling a carer in a residential shift. Related to area.
rcWing: Defines named wings/units within a residential care home area. Related to area.
reasonCancel: Defines visit cancellation reason codes with billing and pay impact flags and optional percentage rates. Referenced by recurrCancel.
recordSchedule: Logs schedule change events including carer swaps, linking old and new recurring schedule and timesheet IDs. Related to client and carer.
recurModified: Stores snapshots of recurring schedule records at the point of modification. Related to client and carer.
recurr: Core table defining recurring visit schedules between carers and clients with full scheduling, pay, billing, and shift configuration. Central table referenced by timesheets, cancellations, and travel calculations.
recurrBufferOff: Records whether the buffer time is switched off for a specific recurring schedule. Related to recurr.
recurrCancel: Records cancellation events for specific recurring schedules with reason, pay, and billing outcome. Related to recurr and reasonCancel.
recurrDeleted: Archives deleted recurring schedule snapshots with reason and run reference. Related to client and carer.
recurrDeletedBackup: Full backup copy of deleted recurring schedule records for recovery purposes. Related to client and carer.
recurrExtend: Logs recurring schedule end date extension events. Related to recurr.
recurrJobtypeChange: Logs changes of job type between old and new recurring schedules. Related to recurr.
recurrNotifications: Stores pending recurring schedule change notifications awaiting publication to carers or clients. Related to client and carer.
recurrRemoved: Logs individual recurring schedule removal events with reason. Related to client and carer.
recurrScheduleHistory: Full audit history of recurring schedule records as they existed at each point in time. Related to client and carer.
recurrState: Lookup table of recurring schedule state labels. Referenced by recurr.
recurrType: Lookup table of recurring schedule type labels. Referenced by recurr.
recurrWeekCode: Lookup table of week pattern codes with display names. Referenced by recurring schedule week fields.
referralBy: Lookup table of named referral sources for client intake. Referenced by clientDetails.
referralReason: Lookup table of named referral reason categories per company/location. Referenced by clientDetails.
rememberMe_tokens: Stores remember-me authentication tokens for persistent user sessions. Related to carer.
reportsBackground: Stores background report generation jobs with input parameters, status, and output link. Related to company and location.
reportsBackgroundSeen: Tracks which users have viewed completed background report results. Related to reportsBackground.
requiredActions: Defines named required action items for client or carer side workflows with status. Related to company and location.
requiredActionsComment: Stores comments added to required action records for clients or carers. Related to client and carer.
requiredActionsPick: Tracks the completion status of required actions for specific clients or carers, with comment and date. Related to requiredActions, client, and carer.
respiteBookingRequest: Records respite booking requests submitted by family members for clients, with approval workflow. Related to client.
reviewReasonsPRSB: Lookup table of review reasons for PRSB care plan review cycles. Referenced by careplanTakenPRSB.
riskAssessmentPRSB: Stores PRSB-format risk assessment records for clients within care plans, with pre/post risk scores and sign-off. Related to careplanTakenPRSB and client.
riskCategoriesPRSB: Lookup table of risk category names for PRSB risk assessments. Referenced by riskAssessmentPRSB.
saveTravelFullTimes: Caches calculated travel time and expense summary totals per carer over a date range. Related to carer.
scheduledGroupReportTemp: Temporary table storing scheduled group report data rows for batch report generation. Related to client and carer.
scheduleFlags: Defines named schedule flag labels per company/location for tagging recurring visits. Referenced by scheduleFlagsEvents.
scheduleFlagsEvents: Links schedule flags to specific recurring visit records. Related to recurr and scheduleFlags.
screening: Stores initial client screening assessment covering mobility, health, home environment, care needs, and consent. Related to client.
screeningTable: Stores simplified screening checklist flag results. Standalone.
screening_status: Records the screening approval status and comments for clients. Related to client.
screening_three: Stores extended client screening data covering health and safety, medication, mobility aids, care documentation, and client preferences. Related to client.
screening_two: Stores client screening data covering pain, cardiac, urinary, bowel, mobility, nutrition, and medication sections. Related to client.
sessions: Laravel application session store for authenticated users. Related to users.
setting: Stores global application settings including business name, contact details, and server URL. Standalone config table.
sharedBookmarks: Links shared bookmark folders to specific users within a company/location. Related to bookmarkFolders.
SickEventType: Lookup table of sick leave event type names per company/location. Referenced by holidays and cmHolidayRequests.
